name: Agent Browser
description: Control browsers and Electron apps with the agent-browser CLI. Docs: https://agent-browser.dev

tools.name: agent_browser
tools.title: Agent Browser
tools.description: Run an agent-browser CLI command to automate browsers, web apps, iOS Safari, or CDP-connected Electron apps. Docs: https://agent-browser.dev
promptGuidelines: Snapshot before interacting and re-snapshot after navigation or DOM-changing actions because @refs expire.

command.description: agent-browser command, for example open, snapshot, click, fill, wait, screenshot, get, connect, close, or session.

args.description: Command arguments, excluding the agent-browser binary and global flags.

native.description: Start/use native daemon mode for this command. Defaults to true for open/connect/device/session commands.

timeoutSeconds.description: Execution timeout in seconds. Default 30, max 300.

skills.title: Agent Browser Tool
skills.description: Use when automating browsers, web apps, iOS Safari, or CDP-connected Electron apps with the agent_browser tool.
